findings.finding: Task 6 verification 2 uses bin/cortex-jcc --version; passes/fails depending on CORTEX_COMMAND_ROOT env state, not shim correctness.
cortex-jcc + inner script double-counting in aggregator; composition rule undocumented.
findings.evidence_quote: cortex-jccs adoption is captured at the wrapper level only.

findings.finding: Task 6 lists 5 bash files but does not gate-verify each shebang; head|grep would pass even on a Python file with the literal string in a comment.
findings.evidence_quote: Both files verified at plan time as plain Python

findings.finding: Self-test probe records inflate Records: total in default report; aggregator filtering scope unspecified.
findings.evidence_quote: Probe records ARE written to the real session log.

findings.finding: scripts array in --json schema does not specify whether zero-count inventory items appear or only candidates_for_review; ordering also unspecified.
skipped_malformed_lines aggregation across multiple JSONL files unspecified (per-file END vs single awk over all files).
findings.evidence_quote: skipped_malformed_lines is incremented inside the awk parser whenever a line cannot be matched to the expected pattern.

findings.finding: wc -l counts newlines, not lines; breadcrumb writer format not constrained to terminate every entry with newline.
findings.evidence_quote: Any failure path writes a one-line entry to ~/.cache/cortex/log-invocation-errors.log

findings.finding: No-data path mechanism unspecified for missing lifecycle/sessions/ parent; works under default bash with [ -f ] guard but breaks if implementer uses find.
Verification 2 captures grep exit code, not git commit exit; weakens discriminative power.
Verification 1 produces real commit + reset; does not check clean tree, not detached HEAD, not mid-rebase.
findings.evidence_quote: make a noop edit to bin/cortex-jcc

findings.finding: Verification 1 commit triggers Phase 3 just build-plugin; mirrored cortex-jcc may drift after revert if build-plugin not idempotent.
findings.evidence_quote: make a noop edit to bin/cortex-jcc

findings.finding: Helper bug-fix re-triggers gate against full inventory; commit health coupled to inventory-wide shim coverage.
Probe bin/cortex-test-no-shim used by Tasks 4 and 9 verifications; no idempotent setup if a previous run was interrupted.
Phase 3 dual-source mirror of bin/cortex-test-no-shim depends on Phase 1.5 short-circuit; speculative future placement-refactor could leave stale plugin-tree mirrors.
findings.evidence_quote: create a probe bin/cortex-test-no-shim (no shim line)

findings.finding: Task 5 step 4 tail -1 concurrent-unsafe under O_APPEND atomicity with parallel writers; non-deterministic in overnight populations.
Task 9 verification 1 git checkout -- destructive on dirty working trees; clobbers unstaged edits.
findings.evidence_quote: git reset --soft HEAD^ && git restore --staged bin/cortex-jcc && git checkout -- bin/cortex-jcc

findings.finding: Six plan-{test,deny,r8,r10,rt,selftest}-sid test session dirs accumulate; only Task 2 verification 4 cleans.
Task 3 verification depends on jq but never pre-checks; on CI without jq verification passes for wrong reason.
Task 5 step 4 remediation hint enumerates only cortex init; misleading for worktree, missing-init-in-this-repo, or shape-mismatch causes.
findings.evidence_quote: run cortex init to register the log path in sandbox.filesystem.allowWrite
